user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes, scrambled eggs, and a side of turkey bacon and skillet potatoes — a hearty, familiar American-style breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk buttermilk, flour, baking powder, a pinch of salt, an egg, and melted butter; cook pancakes on a hot griddle until golden and stack. Scramble two eggs with a splash of milk and cook gently for soft curds. Pan-sear turkey bacon (or regular bacon) until crisp. For skillet potatoes, cube and sauté potatoes with a little oil, diced onion, and bell pepper until golden. Serve pancakes with a small drizzle of maple syrup, eggs and bacon on the side, and a portion of skillet potatoes. Add fresh fruit or a small side salad for brightness.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides a mix of carbohydrates (pancakes, potatoes) for energy and high-quality protein from eggs and bacon. Using turkey bacon and moderate portion sizes reduces saturated fat; pairing with fruit or a small side of vegetables increases fiber and micronutrient content. Watch syrup and added fats for added sugars and calories.

result.reasoning: Day 1 breakfast is Greek/Mediterranean themed; appending a classic American plate (-1) adds a contrasting, familiar breakfast option for Father while complementing existing higher-protein Mediterranean choices.
